flow 1: entities -> users -> notifications -> reports -> categories -> areas
the diagram models a system with entities, users, notifications, reports, areas, and categories.
the main flow shows associations between these classes, indicating relationships between them.
reports are linked to users, categories, and areas, suggesting a reporting system with user accountability and categorization.
notifications are linked to users, indicating a notification system for user interactions.

ui -> ui — type=message; label="validazione input"; explanation="ui validates input"
ui -> firebaseauthentication — type=message; label="sign(email, password)"; explanation="ui sends credentials to authentication service"
firebaseauthentication -> firebaseauthentication — type=message; label="[credenziali valide]"; explanation="authentication service validates credentials"
firebaseauthentication -> firebasefirestore — type=message; label="recupera dati utente (uid dal token)"; explanation="authentication service retrieves user data"
firebasefirestore -> firebaseauthentication — type=message; label="restituisci dati utente"; explanation="data storage returns user data"
firebaseauthentication -> ui — type=message; label="restituisci token"; explanation="authentication service returns token"
firebaseauthentication -> ui — type=message; label="[credenziali errate]"; explanation="authentication service returns error"
ui -> ui — type=message; label="[login riuscito]"; explanation="login successful"
ui -> ui — type=message; label="accesso effettuato con successo"; explanation="ui displays success message"
ui -> ui — type=message; label="[login fallito]"; explanation="login failed"
ui -> ui — type=message; label="mostra messaggio di errore"; explanation="ui displays error message"

flow 1: utente -> ui (inserisci credenziali (email, password)) -> ui (validazione input) -> firebaseauthentication (sign(email, password)) -> firebaseauthentication ([credenziali valide]) -> firebasefirestore (recupera dati utente (uid dal token)) -> firebaseauthentication (restituisci dati utente) -> firebaseauthentication (restituisci token) -> ui ([login riuscito]) -> ui (accesso effettuato con successo)
flow 2: ui -> firebaseauthentication (sign(email, password)) -> firebaseauthentication ([credenziali errate]) -> ui ([login fallito]) -> ui (mostra messaggio di errore)
the diagram models a user login sequence involving a user, a ui, a firebase authentication service, and a firebase firestore database.
the main flow involves the user entering credentials, validation, authentication, data retrieval, and successful login.
an alternative flow handles the case of invalid credentials, displaying an error message to the user.
the diagram highlights the interaction between the ui and the firebase services for authentication and data retrieval.
utente -> ui — type=message; label="inserisci dati registrazione"; explanation="user provides registration data"
ui -> firebaseauthentication — type=message; label="creaaccount(email, password)"; explanation="ui sends registration request"
firebaseauthentication -> firebaseauthentication — type=message; label="valida()"; explanation="authentication service validates data"
firebaseauthentication -> firebasestore — type=message; label="salvautente(nome, email, token)"; explanation="authentication service saves user data"
firebasestore -> firebaseauthentication — type=message; label="conferma salvataggio"; explanation="data storage confirms saving"
firebaseauthentication -> ui — type=message; label="conferma registrazione avvenuta o errore"; explanation="authentication service confirms registration or reports error"
firebaseauthentication -> ui — type=message; label="[dati validi] token di autenticazione"; explanation="authentication service returns authentication token"
firebaseauthentication -> firebasestore — type=message; label="[errore registrazione]"; explanation="authentication service reports an error"

flow 1: utente -> ui (inserisci dati registrazione) -> firebaseauthentication (creaaccount(email, password)) -> firebaseauthentication (valida()) -> firebasestore (salvautente(nome, email, token)) -> firebasestore (conferma salvataggio) -> firebaseauthentication -> ui (conferma registrazione avvenuta o errore) and firebaseauthentication -> ui ([dati validi] token di autenticazione)
the diagram models the user registration process within a system using firebase authentication and firebase store.
the user provides registration data through the ui, which is then sent to the firebase authentication service.
the authentication service validates the data and, if valid, saves the user information to the firebase store.
the firebase store confirms the save operation, and the authentication service returns a confirmation or an error message to the ui.
an error path is present if the validation fails, leading to an error message being displayed to the user.
utente -> ui — type=message; label="inserisci segnalazione (descrizione, immagine, coordinate, urgenza)"; explanation="user provides report details"
ui -> ui — type=message; label="validazione dati input"; explanation="ui validates input data"
ui -> utente — type=message; label="dati incompleti o errati"; explanation="ui informs user of invalid data"
utente -> ui — type=message; label="correggi e reinvia"; explanation="user corrects and resubmits data"
ui -> firebaseprestora — type=message; label="carica immagine(immagine)"; explanation="ui uploads image to firebase storage"
firebaseprestora -> firebasestorage — type=message; label="url_immagine salvata"; explanation="firebase storage returns url of saved image"
ui -> ui — type=message; label="cerca ente competente più vicino(coordinate, urgenza)"; explanation="ui searches for the appropriate authority"
ui -> ui — type=message; label="salvasegnalazione(datisegnalazione + url immagine + dati ente)"; explanation="ui saves the report data"
ui -> utente — type=message; label="conferma invio a segnalazione con ente assegnato"; explanation="ui confirms report submission with assigned authority"

flow 1: utente -> ui (inserisci segnalazione) -> ui (validazione dati input) -> ui -> utente (dati incompleti o errati) -> utente -> ui (correggi e reinvia) -> ui -> firebaseprestora (carica immagine) -> firebasestorage (url_immagine salvata) -> ui (cerca ente competente) -> ui (salvasegnalazione) -> ui -> utente (conferma invio a segnalazione)
the diagram models the sequence of interactions involved in a user submitting a report through a ui, including image uploading and authority assignment.
the process involves data validation and correction loops to ensure data integrity.
the image is uploaded to firebase storage, and its url is used in the report data.
the ui searches for the appropriate authority based on coordinates and urgency.
the final step confirms the report submission with the assigned authority.
